Test Case Description: Validate that a small startup profile with only core mandatory fields populated is accepted
Input Data (if applicable): Record contains Company Name, Category, Year of Incorporation; optional fields empty
Expected Result: Pass — Mandatory Not Null rules satisfied; optional gaps allowed per validation modes

Test Case Description: Validate system behavior when only 25–40% of optional enrichment fields are populated
Input Data (if applicable): Partial dataset for lesser-known private company
Expected Result: Pass with Warning — Profile accepted but flagged for enrichment (Manual or Automated follow-up)

Test Case Description: Validate rejection when mandatory identity fields are missing
Input Data (if applicable): Dataset missing Company Name or Year of Incorporation
Expected Result: Fail — Violates mandatory nullability and legal identity business rules

Test Case Description: Validate graceful degradation when operational, hiring, or financial fields are missing
Input Data (if applicable): Startup record with no Employee Size, Revenue, or Hiring Velocity
Expected Result: Pass — Optional fields may be blank; system must not break UI or analytics

Test Case Description: Validate profile completeness scoring for private company with sparse data
Input Data (if applicable): Record with minimal public data available
Expected Result: Pass with Low Richness Score — Score reflects limited data; no hard validation failure

Test Case Description: Validate that format and regex constraints still apply even when profile is partial
Expected Result: Pass — All populated fields comply with schema constraints

Test Case Description: Validate system behavior when LLM-generated partial profiles hallucinate missing data
Expected Result: Fail or Flag — Must trigger manual review or confidence downgrade

Test Case Description: Validate acceptance of bootstrapped startup profiles with limited public footprint
Input Data (if applicable): Sparse dataset with only branding + legal basics
